description: Shipped a design-deck adaptation (recommended-slots hero + copy-for-parent drawer + idiot-proof search defaults) to production OUTSIDE the GSD phase workflow. /gsd-new-milestone was invoked earlier but interrupted before REQUIREMENTS.md/ROADMAP.md were written.

completed_tasks.name: Adapt design deck at ~/Downloads/BeGifted Scheduling into production feature
Fast-forward main and push to GitHub

remaining_tasks.name: Human UAT on production (sign in, verify recommended slots + copy drawer + unchanged calendar grid)
Decide milestone framing: retroactively capture as v1.1 micro-milestone OR fold into the larger v1.1 cycle still being scoped via /gsd-new-milestone
Update PROJECT.md + AGENTS.md to reflect shipped features (recommended slots, copy-for-parent drawer, search defaults change from 9-17 to 15-20)
Clean up orphan untracked files in working tree (duplicate 'route 2.ts', .planning/debug/, unreferenced 04-CONTEXT.md and FULL-APP-UI-REVIEW.md)

human_actions_pending.action: Sign in to https://bgscheduler.vercel.app and manually verify: (a) 3 recommended-slot cards render after a default search, (b) 'Copy for parent' drawer opens with tone toggle + editable textarea + working clipboard copy, (c) calendar grid on the right looks identical to v1.0 (no overlap changes, no density view)
human_actions_pending.context: Cannot be automated — requires Google OAuth

decisions.decision: Build recommended-slots client-side from existing RangeSearchResponse
decisions.rationale: Avoided backend/API changes; keeps scope small and safe
User explicitly asked to preserve current design principles and avoid student-data overlap issues from the density view

decisions.decision: Keep dropdown-based search (not pill/unified query bar)
decisions.rationale: User prefers dropdowns for idiot-proofing; just changed defaults (15:00-20:00, 90min) and added explicit 'Any X' labels + filter count

decisions.decision: Direct push to main, no PR
decisions.rationale: User choice — repo has no CI or branch protection
User choice over preview-promote; matches documented AGENTS.md flow

decisions.decision: Change default search window from 09:00-17:00 / 60min to 15:00-20:00 / 90min
decisions.rationale: Matches tutor working window per design deck — idiot-proofing so staff don't need to know it

uncommitted_files: M AGENTS.md (pre-existing, unrelated to this work)
?? src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route 2.ts (filesystem duplicate, likely copy-paste artifact, should be deleted)
next_action: Sign in to bgscheduler.vercel.app for UAT. If feature looks good, decide whether to run /gsd-new-milestone v1.1 to properly capture this + any next milestone work, or just update PROJECT.md inline. If anything looks wrong, `npx vercel rollback` restores v1.0.
context_notes: Work began as /gsd-new-milestone v1.1 setup but pivoted to implement a design deck the user provided (~/Downloads/BeGifted Scheduling/). Deck had: App, QueryBar, Results, Calendar, CopyDrawer, Data, Primitives, Tweaks .jsx files. User wanted: (1) recommended slots (cherry-picked), (2) KEEP our GCal grid (design's density view causes overlap), (3) KEEP dropdown-based search (design's unified pill bar not idiot-proof enough). Shipped in one commit `9e3e4ad` via feat/recommended-slots branch → preview → main → prod. Feature branch is deleted locally, never pushed to origin. No backend/API changes; pure client-side derivation from existing search response.
